_comment: TASK-041 recorded flythrough camera path (architecture §5.8). The continuous descent outside the Milky Way -> spiral arms -> star field -> Sol -> Earth, plus the reverse legs the soak loops on. Positions are camera waypoints expressed in each scale context; the clock is paused at a frozen epoch so Earth's waypoint is deterministic. flythrough-descent.ts replays this as discrete per-context goTo legs through the REAL nav controller + streaming pipeline (this gate measures the shipped pipeline, like TASK-030). Symbolic targets (milkyWayCenter / sol / earth) resolve at runtime from the deterministic local group + frozen-epoch system feed; arrival distances + durations are the committed, reviewable knobs.
